theory.canonical_statement: extbf Dimensional Gateway : Rotating frame at relativistic rim speeds creates Kerr-like spacetime metric \\item \ extbf Harmonic Modulator : Permeable boundary with tessellated oscillations \\end enumerate Sound waves in magnetized media couple to magnetic field lines through magnetoacoustic modes. \\section Mathematical Framework \\subsection Magnetoacoustic Wave Equation In a magnetized medium, acoustic perturbations couple to magnetic field oscillations: \\begin equation \\frac \\partial^2 \\xi \\partial t^2 = v A^2 \ abla^2 \\xi + \\frac 1 \\mu 0 \\rho (\ abla \ imes \\mathbf B ) \ imes (\ abla \ imes \\delta \\mathbf B ) \\end equation where: \\begin itemize \\item = displacement field (acoustic) \\item = Alfv\u00e9n velocity \\item = magnetic field perturbation \\end itemize \\subsection Topological Mode Coupling The magnetic helicity (topological invariant) couples to acoustic mod
